     the Fermi energy is    -0.7394 ev

!    total energy              =  -14765.58211038 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000001 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.19813142 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14765.38397896 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -319674.04995734 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  161295.02971581 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6092.54131299 Ry
